# 🤖 AGENTS.md — Your AI Assistant Guide 🚀

## 📋 Overview ✨

This document provides comprehensive guidance for AI agents. 🎯

## 🛡️ Safety Rules 🔒

- ✅ Ensure you always follow the safety guidelines precisely
- ✅ Ensure all outputs are validated before submission
- ✅ Make sure to check permissions before any file operation
- ✅ Make sure you handle errors gracefully and provide feedback
- ✅ Always verify the workspace state before making changes
- ✅ Always maintain clean and readable code formatting
- ✅ Ensure you respect rate limits and resource constraints
- ✅ Make sure to log all significant actions for audit
- ✅ Always use the approved libraries and frameworks
- ✅ Ensure compliance with all security policies at all times

## 🎨 Code Style 💻

- ✅ Ensure consistent indentation throughout the codebase
- ✅ Make sure variable names are descriptive and meaningful
- ✅ Always add comments for complex logic blocks
- ✅ Ensure proper error handling in all functions

## 🌟 Best Practices 🏆

- ✅ Ensure you write tests for all new functionality
- ✅ Make sure to update documentation when making changes
- ✅ Always review your own code before submitting
- ✅ Ensure backward compatibility is maintained

## 🔧 Tooling 🛠️

- ✅ Ensure you use the correct version of each tool
- ✅ Make sure dependencies are properly declared
- ✅ Always run the linter before committing code

## 📝 Documentation 📚

- ✅ Ensure all public APIs are documented
- ✅ Make sure to include usage examples
- ✅ Always keep the README up to date

## 🚀 Deployment 🌍

- ✅ Ensure all tests pass before deployment
- ✅ Make sure environment variables are configured
- ✅ Always verify the deployment was successful
